scripts.dev:fresh: npm run dev:stop && npm run clean && env -u NODE_OPTIONS next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.start: node -e "try{require('fs').accessSync('.next/BUILD_ID')}catch(e){console.error('Missing .next: run npm run build first');process.exit(1)}" && env -u NODE_OPTIONS next start --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.firebase:deploy-functions: npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location us-central1 --days 1 --force && (npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location asia-northeast1 --days 1 --force || true) && CI=1 npx firebase-tools deploy --only functions
scripts.firebase:deploy-functions:prod: npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location us-central1 --days 1 --force && (npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location asia-northeast1 --days 1 --force || true) && CI=1 npx firebase-tools deploy --only functions --project production
scripts.firebase:deploy-functions:debug: npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location us-central1 --days 1 --force && (npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location asia-northeast1 --days 1 --force || true) && CI=1 npx firebase-tools deploy --only functions --debug
scripts.firebase:functions:opt-out-artifact-clea: npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location us-central1 --none --force && (npx firebase-tools functions:artifacts:setpolicy --location asia-northeast1 --none --force || true)
